prompt: Bold blocky typographic logo on solid black background. The text 'MM AGENCY.' rendered in an extremely bold, condensed, geometric custom typeface — heavy block letters with very tight spacing, almost touching each other. All letters are solid white. The style is brutalist and architectural — thick rectangular strokes, sharp 90-degree corners, no curves, monospaced industrial feel. The period/dot at the end is a solid cyan square (#00E3FF) instead of a circle. No icon, no symbol — only bold condensed typography filling the center of the frame. The overall feel is like a bold magazine masthead or editorial headline. Vector quality, perfectly crisp edges, flat solid colors only, centered composition on matte black.
